title: Stale queued PR no-touch skip

decisions.label: self-test assertion failures silently swallowed
decisions.rationale: Moved self-test outside the production catch path so assertion failures exit nonzero while runtime API uncertainty still exits 0 with stale=false outputs.

decisions.label: stale-render failure leaves no fallback report
decisions.rationale: Allowed the setup-failure fallback to render a report if the stale no-touch render step itself fails.

validationAfterReviewFixes: node tools/computer-use-e2e/run-remote-cua.mjs render-unavailable --note 'stale-queued-run smoke after review fixes...' --run-dir /tmp/nixmac-stale-run-unavailable-smoke
